title: OpenAI reportedly considers handing 5% stake to the government. Here’s why the AI lab would consider that move.
summary: OpenAI is reportedly offering a 5% equity stake to the government as a strategy to address mounting criticism of the AI industry. This move aims to position regulators as equity partners, potentially easing regulatory scrutiny and political pressure.
content: Bringing the government on board as an equity partner may serve to dilute some of the criticism of the AI industry that has developed momentum in recent months.

zh.title: OpenAI据称考虑将5%股份转让给政府。以下是这家AI实验室考虑此举的原因。
zh.summary: OpenAI据称计划向政府提供5%的股权，作为应对AI行业日益增加的批评的策略。此举旨在让监管机构成为股权合伙人，可能会缓解监管审查和政治压力。

title: Google loses fight over record $4.7 billion EU antitrust fine
summary: Google has lost its legal challenge against a record €4 billion EU antitrust fine imposed in 2018 for abusing Android's dominance. The ruling upholds one of the largest tech penalties ever issued and sets a precedent for future antitrust cases.
content: In 2018, the European Commission slapped Google with the record-breaking penalty on the grounds that it abused Android's mobile dominance.

zh.title: 谷歌输掉了针对创纪录47亿美元欧盟反垄断罚款的诉讼
zh.summary: 谷歌输掉了对2018年欧盟因其滥用Android主导地位而处以的创纪录40亿欧元反垄断罚款的法律诉讼。该裁决维持了有史以来最大的科技罚款之一，并为未来的反垄断案件树立了先例。

title: M&A is ‘on fire’ as large-cap firms simplify, Citi UK CEO says
summary: U.K. M&A activity is surging as large multinational firms simplify operations and overseas buyers target British assets, according to Citi's U.K. CEO. The trend reflects broad corporate consolidation and renewed interest in British companies amid market stabilization.
content: Citi U.K. CEO Tiina Lee said U.K. M&A is “on fire” as companies simplify and overseas buyers target British assets.

zh.title: 花旗英国首席执行官表示，随着大型公司简化业务，并购"火爆"进行
zh.summary: 据花旗英国首席执行官称，随着大型跨国公司简化业务和海外买家寻求英国资产，英国并购活动激增。这一趋势反映了广泛的企业整合以及在市场稳定中对英国公司重新燃起的兴趣。

title: Tank maker KNDS postpones IPO amid market struggles for defense
summary: Tank manufacturer KNDS has postponed its Amsterdam IPO citing adverse market conditions in the defense sector. The shareholders determined to delay the offering until market conditions become more favorable for capital market entry.
content: Shareholders of the Amsterdam-based company have decided the process to IPO will proceed "upon the return of more favorable market conditions," KNDS said.

zh.title: 坦克制造商KNDS因防务市场困难推迟IPO上市
zh.summary: 坦克制造商KNDS因防务部门市场环境恶劣而推迟阿姆斯特丹IPO。股东决定推迟融资,待资本市场条件更为有利后再进行。

title: Oil prices on pace for fourth straight weekly loss as Trump sees progress in U.S.-Iran talks
summary: Oil prices fell more than 1% and are tracking toward a fourth consecutive weekly loss following U.S.-Iran diplomatic talks. The decline reflects optimism about potential progress in negotiations between Washington and Tehran.
content: Oil prices fell more than 1% on Wednesday after talks between Washington and Tehran concluded.

zh.title: 特朗普称美伊谈判取得进展,油价面临连续第四周下跌
zh.summary: 在美伊外交谈判后,油价下跌超过1%,面临连续第四周下跌。下跌反映了市场对华盛顿和德黑兰谈判潜在进展的乐观预期。

title: Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix shares tumble over 9% as chip rout spreads from Wall Street
summary: Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix shares plummeted over 7% in early trading as the semiconductor selloff that began on Wall Street spreads to Asian chipmakers. The decline signals continued sector weakness amid broader market concerns about chip valuations.
content: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix plummeted more than 7% in early Thursday trading.

zh.title: 芯片抛售从华尔街蔓延至亚洲,三星和SK海力士股价跌幅超过9%
zh.summary: 随着华尔街的半导体抛售蔓延至亚洲芯片制造商,三星电子和SK海力士股价在早盘暴跌7%以上。在对芯片估值的广泛市场担忧下,该行业持续显示疲软迹象。

title: OpenAI proposes 5% stake to Trump administration to ease Washington pressure: report
summary: OpenAI has proposed offering a 5% ownership stake to the Trump administration to ease political pressure on AI companies. The proposal aligns with Trump's stated belief that government ownership stakes would make the public "partners" in the AI revolution.
content: Trump said in June that the U.S. taking an ownership stake in AI giants would be "a beautiful thing" and make American public "partners in this revolution."

zh.title: OpenAI向特朗普政府提议5%股份以缓解华盛顿压力：报告
zh.summary: OpenAI已向特朗普政府提议提供5%的所有权股份，以缓解对AI公司的政治压力。该提议符合特朗普的既定信念，即政府所有权股份会使公众成为AI革命的"合作伙伴"。

title: Apple plans five new iPhones through 2027, eyes Chinese-made chips amid foldable push, reports say
summary: Apple is planning five new iPhone models through 2027 and exploring Chinese memory suppliers for foldable device expansion. The diversified supply chain strategy reflects Apple's push to develop new form factors while managing geopolitical supply chain risks.
content: Apple is planning five new iPhones by 2027 and is considering Chinese memory suppliers as it expands foldable production, reports say.

zh.title: 苹果计划推出五款新iPhone至2027年，在推进可折叠设备中关注中国制造芯片
zh.summary: 苹果正计划推出五款新iPhone机型至2027年，并为可折叠设备扩展探索中国内存供应商。这种多元化供应链战略反映了苹果在开发新外形因素的同时管理地缘政治供应链风险的努力。

title: Meta says WhatsApp usernames are safeguarded against scams after India flags cybersecurity risks
summary: Meta has defended WhatsApp's username feature against Indian government cybersecurity concerns, asserting that built-in safeguards protect against scams. The dispute underscores regulatory tension between tech companies and governments over platform security standards.
content: Meta has defended its WhatsApp username feature after the Indian government raised cybersecurity concerns.

zh.title: Meta表示WhatsApp用户名在印度标记网络安全风险后受到防诈骗保护
zh.summary: Meta为WhatsApp的用户名功能辩护，针对印度政府的网络安全担忧，声称内置的保护措施可防止诈骗。这场争议凸显了科技公司与政府之间关于平台安全标准的监管紧张关系。

title: Russia launches massive strike on Ukraine as Poland scrambles jets, Finland restricts airspace
summary: Russia launched a massive strike on Ukraine using long-range weapons and drones, prompting Poland to scramble fighter jets and Finland to restrict airspace. The escalation highlights intensifying military conflict in Eastern Europe with regional spillover effects.
content: The Russian defence ministry said that it launched a "massive strike using long-range precision air, land, and sea-based weapons and attack drones."

zh.title: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发起大规模攻击，波兰紧急出动战斗机，芬兰限制空域
zh.summary: 俄罗斯使用远程武器和无人机对乌克兰发起了大规模攻击，促使波兰紧急出动战斗机，芬兰限制空域。这次升级凸显了东欧地区日益激化的军事冲突及其对周边地区的影响。

title: Singapore seizes $42m mansion over Nvidia chip smuggling
summary: Singapore seized a $42 million mansion in a probe into the illegal smuggling of servers containing Nvidia AI semiconductors. The seizure reflects authorities' efforts to combat the black market trade in restricted AI hardware.
content: The luxury home was seized as part of a probe into the illegal trade of servers containing AI semiconductors.

zh.title: 新加坡查获价值4200万美元豪宅，涉英伟达芯片走私
zh.summary: 新加坡在调查非法走私含有英伟达人工智能芯片的服务器案件中查获了一座价值4200万美元的豪宅。这次查获反映了当局打击限制性人工智能硬件黑市交易的努力。

title: Old British fridges 'cannot cope with the heat'
summary: Older British refrigerators are failing under hot weather conditions as rising temperatures strain aging cooling systems. Experts warn that many households have appliances unable to handle climate change-driven temperature increases.
content: Experts say older fridges are failing in hot weather as rising temperatures put them under pressure.

zh.title: 老旧英国冰箱"无法应对炎热"
zh.summary: 随着气温上升对陈旧冷却系统造成压力，英国的老旧冰箱在炎热天气条件下故障。专家警告许多家庭的电器无法承受气候变化导致的温度上升。

title: Volkswagen braces for boardroom showdown over historic cost-cutting plan
summary: Volkswagen is preparing for a major boardroom battle over plans to close four factories and cut 100,000 jobs as part of historic restructuring. The dramatic cost-cutting measures signal the auto giant's struggle to adapt to the electric vehicle transition.
content: Volkswagen is poised for a boardroom showdown following reports that the auto giant is weighing up shutting four factories and implementing 100,000 job cuts.

zh.title: 大众汽车董事会掀起波澜，酝酿重磅成本削减计划
zh.summary: 大众汽车正为其历史性重组计划准备一场重大的董事会争议，该计划包括关闭四家工厂和裁员10万人。这些剧烈的成本削减措施反映出这家汽车巨头在适应电动汽车转型过程中面临的困难。

title: Amazon is designing its own AI chips for Echo, Fire TV and future devices, exec tells CNBC
summary: Amazon is developing custom AI chips for Echo, Fire TV, and future devices to reduce semiconductor supplier dependence. The proprietary chip strategy reflects Amazon's broader push to control its hardware stack amid AI expansion.
content: Amazon hardware chief Panos Panay says the company is designing custom chips for key devices as it experiments with AI gadgets.

zh.title: 亚马逊为Echo、Fire TV及未来设备设计自有AI芯片，高管告诉CNBC
zh.summary: 亚马逊正在为Echo、Fire TV和未来设备开发定制AI芯片，以减少对半导体供应商的依赖。这项专有芯片战略反映了亚马逊在AI扩展中控制其硬件堆栈的更广泛推动。

title: World Cup dreams shattered as StubHub tickets cancelled at last minute
summary: Hundreds of StubHub ticket holders had their World Cup tickets cancelled last-minute, derailing their plans to attend the tournament. The cancellations highlight vulnerabilities in secondary ticket market practices and consumer protection gaps.
content: Hundreds of fans who bought World Cup tickets on resale site StubHub say they have had them cancelled at the last minute.

zh.title: 世界杯梦想破灭，StubHub门票在最后关头被取消
zh.summary: 数百名StubHub票务持有者在最后关头突然被取消世界杯门票，打乱了他们参加赛事的计划。这些取消凸显了二级票务市场实践中的漏洞和消费者保护的缺陷。

title: Inside India newsletter: Amazon, Walmart-owned Flipkart get ready to shake upIndia's delivery-in-minutes sector
summary: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are rapidly expanding quick commerce operations in India to capture growth and maintain relevance in the fast-growing delivery-in-minutes market. Both retailers are intensifying competition in this high-growth segment.
content: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are scrambling to expand quick commerce operations in India, not just to chase growth but to remain relevant to consumers.

zh.title: 印度内部通讯：亚马逊和沃尔玛旗下Flipkart准备在印度分钟级配送市场掀起波澜
zh.summary: 亚马逊和沃尔玛旗下Flipkart正在印度快速扩展快速电商业务，以获得增长并在快速增长的分钟级配送市场中保持相关性。两家零售商在这一高增长细分市场中加剧了竞争。

title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
summary: A House Judiciary Committee report found that the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies. The findings raise concerns about unfair trade practices and market access barriers in South Korea.
content: The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies, in a new report.

zh.title: 众议院报告发现韩国政府对Coupang和美国公司存在歧视
zh.summary: 众议院司法委员会的报告发现，韩国政府对Coupang和其他美国公司存在歧视。这些发现引发了对韩国不公平贸易行为和市场准入壁垒的担忧。
